examples.title: Simctl Health Check
examples.description: Checks whether local xcrun/simctl is available, lists iOS simulators, and records a selected simulator UDID.

examples.title: iOS Observability Template
examples.description: Launches an app on a simulator and captures a governed screenshot for operator analysis.

examples.title: iOS Deep Link Template
examples.description: Opens an iOS deep link in the booted simulator and captures a screenshot for validation.

examples.title: iOS Boot And Observe Template
examples.description: Boots a named iOS simulator, launches the profiled app, and captures a screenshot.

examples.title: iOS Install Launch Template
examples.description: Boots a named iOS simulator, installs a local .app bundle, launches it, and captures a screenshot.

examples.title: iOS WebView Session Handoff
examples.description: Builds a governed session handoff artifact for moving authenticated iOS app state into a browser/webview context.

examples.title: iOS Runtime WebView Handoff Template
examples.description: Reads a runtime-exported WebView session handoff artifact from the iOS simulator app container.
